name: BB:FalsePositive: Large Volume Local FW Events
notes: Defines specific events that can create a large volume of false positives in general rules.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Large Volume Local FW Events on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (3500245) Firewall Deny, (3500455) Firewall Deny, (3500629) Firewall Deny, (3501016) Firewall Deny, (3501178) Firewall Deny, (3501374) Firewall Deny, (3501712) Firewall Deny, (3503007) Firewall Deny, (9750036) 106015, (12250509) %ASA-6-106015, (12251657) Deny TCP (no connection) from IP_address/port to IP_address/port flags tcp_flags on interface interface_name.
when the source is Local
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Large Volume Local FW Events on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND when the event QID is one of the following (3500245) Firewall Deny, (3500455) Firewall Deny, (3500629) Firewall Deny, (3501016) Firewall Deny, (3501178) Firewall Deny, (3501374) Firewall Deny, (3501712) Firewall Deny, (3503007) Firewall Deny, (9750036) 106015, (12250509) %ASA-6-106015, (12251657) Deny TCP (no connection) from IP_address/port to IP_address/port flags tcp_flags on interface interface_name.
AND when the source is Local
